title: ageratina ovilla
intro: Ageratina ovilla, also known as Mexican mint, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ageratina ovilla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments.
